identity_preservation: Candidate preserves the same prediction-service-risk-model field identity and serving interface.
qualification_evidence: model quality check passed against fixture holdout
monitor trigger coverage recorded for data drift, schema drift, model quality, and latency regression
regression_results: baseline regression floor preserved for fixture holdout
model regression floor remains visible before default promotion
serving latency regression check passed for fixture trace
authority_check: candidate stays within the same authority ceiling and does not expand prediction-service action rights
evaluator_independence: Independent model rollout review owns the canary decision and candidate cannot approve itself.
residual_escrow: residual: irreversible logged prediction traces remain external-effect audit material; no user-facing action is approved
residual: fixture canary is not a production model rollout
rollback_plan: Rollback by restoring impl://risk-model-v1 as the prediction-service model alias and disabling candidate canary traffic.

irreversible_effects: logged prediction traces are retained as irreversible external effects for audit only

canary_scope: model canary for prediction-service fixture route only
monitor_window: fixture monitor active for data schema model and serving regression signals
non_claims: does not prove runtime model replacement behavior
does not prove production model rollout
